set -euo pipefail

flake_dir="${NIXOS_FLAKE_DIR:-$HOME/.config/nixos}"
cache_dir="${XDG_CACHE_HOME:-$HOME/.cache}/quickshell/top-bar"
cache_file="$cache_dir/updates.json"
lock_file="$cache_dir/updates.lock"
max_age=1800

mkdir -p "$cache_dir"

write_status() {
  local updates_json=$1
  local message=$2
  local state=${3:-ok}
  local temporary
  temporary=$(mktemp "$cache_dir/updates.XXXXXX")

  jq -cn \
    --argjson updates "$updates_json" \
    --arg message "$message" \
    --arg state "$state" \
    '{state: $state, hasUpdates: ($updates | length > 0),
      message: $message, updates: $updates, checkedAt: (now | floor)}' \
    >"$temporary"
  mv "$temporary" "$cache_file"
}

check_updates() (
  local temporary_dir before_lock updates_json count
  temporary_dir=$(mktemp -d)
  trap 'rm -rf "$temporary_dir"' EXIT

  if [[ ! -f "$flake_dir/flake.nix" ]]; then
    write_status '[]' "Unable to check for updates" error
    return
  fi

  cp "$flake_dir/flake.nix" "$temporary_dir/"
  before_lock="$temporary_dir/before.lock"
  if [[ -f "$flake_dir/flake.lock" ]]; then
    cp "$flake_dir/flake.lock" "$temporary_dir/flake.lock"
    cp "$flake_dir/flake.lock" "$before_lock"
  else
    printf '{"nodes":{},"root":"root","version":7}\n' >"$before_lock"
  fi

  if ! nix flake update --flake "$temporary_dir" \
    >"$temporary_dir/update.log" 2>&1; then
    write_status '[]' "Unable to check for updates" error
    return
  fi

  if ! jq -e '.nodes | type == "object"' "$temporary_dir/flake.lock" \
    >/dev/null; then
    write_status '[]' "Unable to check for updates" error
    return
  fi

  updates_json=$(jq -n \
    --slurpfile old "$before_lock" \
    --slurpfile new "$temporary_dir/flake.lock" '
      ($old[0].nodes // {}) as $oldNodes
      | ($new[0].nodes // {}) as $newNodes
      | ($new[0].root // "root") as $rootNode
      | ($newNodes[$rootNode].inputs // {}) as $rootInputs
      | (($oldNodes | keys) + ($newNodes | keys) | unique) as $nodeNames
      | [
          $nodeNames[] as $name
          | select($name != $rootNode)
          | select(
              ($oldNodes[$name].locked // null)
              != ($newNodes[$name].locked // null)
            )
          | ($newNodes[$name] // $oldNodes[$name]) as $node
          | ([
              $rootInputs | to_entries[]
              | select(.value == $name) | .key
            ][0] // $name) as $displayName
          | {
              name: $displayName,
              date: (
                if ($node.locked.lastModified // null) == null then
                  "unknown"
                else
                  ($node.locked.lastModified
                    | todateiso8601 | split("T")[0])
                end
              )
            }
        ]
      | sort_by(.name)
    ')
  count=$(jq 'length' <<<"$updates_json")

  if ((count > 0)); then
    write_status "$updates_json" "$count update(s) available"
  else
    write_status '[]' "System is up to date"
  fi
)

cache_is_fresh() {
  [[ -f "$cache_file" ]] || return 1
  jq -e '
    (.state // "ok") != "error"
    and (.updates | type == "array")
    and (.checkedAt == null or (.checkedAt | type == "number"))
  ' "$cache_file" >/dev/null || return 1

  local current_time file_time
  current_time=$(date +%s)
  file_time=$(stat -c %Y "$cache_file")
  ((current_time - file_time < max_age))
}

exec 9>"$lock_file"

if [[ "${1:-}" == "force" ]]; then
  flock 9
  check_updates
elif ! cache_is_fresh; then
  flock 9
  if ! cache_is_fresh; then
    check_updates
  fi
fi

if [[ -f "$cache_file" ]]; then
  cat "$cache_file"
else
  jq -cn '{state: "checking", hasUpdates: false,
    message: "Checking for updates…", updates: [], checkedAt: null}'
fi

set -euo pipefail

flake_dir="${NIXOS_FLAKE_DIR:-$HOME/.config/nixos}"
cache_dir="${XDG_CACHE_HOME:-$HOME/.cache}/quickshell/top-bar"
cache_file="$cache_dir/updates.json"
lock_file="$cache_dir/updates.lock"
backup_dir=""
had_lockfile=false
rollback_pending=false

wait_before_close() {
  printf '\n'
  read -r -p "Press Enter to close..." _
}

restore_lockfile() {
  if [[ "$had_lockfile" == true ]]; then
    cp -p "$backup_dir/flake.lock" "$flake_dir/flake.lock"
  else
    rm -f "$flake_dir/flake.lock"
  fi
}

cleanup() {
  if [[ "$rollback_pending" == true ]]; then
    restore_lockfile
  fi
  if [[ -n "$backup_dir" ]]; then
    rm -rf "$backup_dir"
  fi
}
trap cleanup EXIT

mkdir -p "$cache_dir"
exec 9>"$lock_file"
flock 9

printf '📦 Starting NixOS update...\n'
cd "$flake_dir"

backup_dir=$(mktemp -d)
if [[ -f flake.lock ]]; then
  cp -p flake.lock "$backup_dir/flake.lock"
  had_lockfile=true
fi
rollback_pending=true

if ! nix flake update; then
  restore_lockfile
  rollback_pending=false
  flock -u 9
  printf '\n❌ Lockfile update failed. The previous lockfile was restored.\n'
  wait_before_close
  exit 1
fi

if ! nh os switch; then
  restore_lockfile
  rollback_pending=false
  flock -u 9
  printf '\n❌ System rebuild failed. The previous lockfile was restored.\n'
  wait_before_close
  exit 1
fi

rollback_pending=false
temporary=$(mktemp "$cache_dir/updates.XXXXXX")
jq -cn '{state: "ok", hasUpdates: false, message: "Just updated",
  updates: [], checkedAt: (now | floor)}' >"$temporary"
mv "$temporary" "$cache_file"
flock -u 9

qs --config top-bar ipc call topbar refreshNix || true

printf '\n✅ Update complete. Quickshell status refreshed.\n'
wait_before_close

1	set -euo pipefail
     2	
     3	flake_dir="${NIXOS_FLAKE_DIR:-$HOME/.config/nixos}"
     4	cache_dir="${XDG_CACHE_HOME:-$HOME/.cache}/quickshell/top-bar"
     5	cache_file="$cache_dir/updates.json"
     6	lock_file="$cache_dir/updates.lock"
     7	max_age=1800
     8	
     9	mkdir -p "$cache_dir"
    10	
    11	write_status() {
    12	  local updates_json=$1
    13	  local message=$2
    14	  local state=${3:-ok}
    15	  local temporary
    16	  temporary=$(mktemp "$cache_dir/updates.XXXXXX")
    17	
    18	  jq -cn \
    19	    --argjson updates "$updates_json" \
    20	    --arg message "$message" \
    21	    --arg state "$state" \
    22	    '{state: $state, hasUpdates: ($updates | length > 0),
    23	      message: $message, updates: $updates, checkedAt: (now | floor)}' \
    24	    >"$temporary"
    25	  mv "$temporary" "$cache_file"
    26	}
    27	
    28	check_updates() (
    29	  local temporary_dir before_lock updates_json count
    30	  temporary_dir=$(mktemp -d)
    31	  trap 'rm -rf "$temporary_dir"' EXIT
    32	
    33	  if [[ ! -f "$flake_dir/flake.nix" ]]; then
    34	    write_status '[]' "Unable to check for updates" error
    35	    return
    36	  fi
    37	
    38	  cp "$flake_dir/flake.nix" "$temporary_dir/"
    39	  before_lock="$temporary_dir/before.lock"
    40	  if [[ -f "$flake_dir/flake.lock" ]]; then
    41	    cp "$flake_dir/flake.lock" "$temporary_dir/flake.lock"
    42	    cp "$flake_dir/flake.lock" "$before_lock"
    43	  else
    44	    printf '{"nodes":{},"root":"root","version":7}\n' >"$before_lock"
    45	  fi
    46	
    47	  if ! nix flake update --flake "$temporary_dir" \
    48	    >"$temporary_dir/update.log" 2>&1; then
    49	    write_status '[]' "Unable to check for updates" error
    50	    return
    51	  fi
    52	
    53	  if ! jq -e '.nodes | type == "object"' "$temporary_dir/flake.lock" \
    54	    >/dev/null; then
    55	    write_status '[]' "Unable to check for updates" error
    56	    return
    57	  fi
    58	
    59	  updates_json=$(jq -n \
    60	    --slurpfile old "$before_lock" \
    61	    --slurpfile new "$temporary_dir/flake.lock" '
    62	      ($old[0].nodes // {}) as $oldNodes
    63	      | ($new[0].nodes // {}) as $newNodes
    64	      | ($new[0].root // "root") as $rootNode
    65	      | ($newNodes[$rootNode].inputs // {}) as $rootInputs
    66	      | (($oldNodes | keys) + ($newNodes | keys) | unique) as $nodeNames
    67	      | [
    68	          $nodeNames[] as $name
    69	          | select($name != $rootNode)
    70	          | select(
    71	              ($oldNodes[$name].locked // null)
    72	              != ($newNodes[$name].locked // null)
    73	            )
    74	          | ($newNodes[$name] // $oldNodes[$name]) as $node
    75	          | ([
    76	              $rootInputs | to_entries[]
    77	              | select(.value == $name) | .key
    78	            ][0] // $name) as $displayName
    79	          | {
    80	              name: $displayName,
    81	              date: (
    82	                if ($node.locked.lastModified // null) == null then
    83	                  "unknown"
    84	                else
    85	                  ($node.locked.lastModified
    86	                    | todateiso8601 | split("T")[0])
    87	                end
    88	              )
    89	            }
    90	        ]
    91	      | sort_by(.name)
    92	    ')
    93	  count=$(jq 'length' <<<"$updates_json")
    94	
    95	  if ((count > 0)); then
    96	    write_status "$updates_json" "$count update(s) available"
    97	  else
    98	    write_status '[]' "System is up to date"
    99	  fi
   100	)
   101	
   102	cache_is_fresh() {
   103	  [[ -f "$cache_file" ]] || return 1
   104	  jq -e '
   105	    (.state // "ok") != "error"
   106	    and (.updates | type == "array")
   107	    and (.checkedAt == null or (.checkedAt | type == "number"))
   108	  ' "$cache_file" >/dev/null || return 1
   109	
   110	  local current_time file_time
   111	  current_time=$(date +%s)
   112	  file_time=$(stat -c %Y "$cache_file")
   113	  ((current_time - file_time < max_age))
   114	}
   115	
   116	exec 9>"$lock_file"
   117	
   118	if [[ "${1:-}" == "force" ]]; then
   119	  flock 9
   120	  check_updates
   121	elif ! cache_is_fresh; then
   122	  flock 9
   123	  if ! cache_is_fresh; then
   124	    check_updates
   125	  fi
   126	fi
   127	
   128	if [[ -f "$cache_file" ]]; then
   129	  cat "$cache_file"
   130	else
   131	  jq -cn '{state: "checking", hasUpdates: false,
   132	    message: "Checking for updates…", updates: [], checkedAt: null}'
   133	fi

     7	backup_dir=""
     8	had_lockfile=false
     9	rollback_pending=false
    10	
    11	wait_before_close() {
    12	  printf '\n'
    13	  read -r -p "Press Enter to close..." _

    18	    cp -p "$backup_dir/flake.lock" "$flake_dir/flake.lock"

    20	    rm -f "$flake_dir/flake.lock"
    21	  fi
    22	}
    23	
    24	cleanup() {
    25	  if [[ "$rollback_pending" == true ]]; then
    26	    restore_lockfile
    27	  fi
    28	  if [[ -n "$backup_dir" ]]; then
    29	    rm -rf "$backup_dir"
    30	  fi
    31	}
    32	trap cleanup EXIT
    33	
    34	mkdir -p "$cache_dir"
    35	exec 9>"$lock_file"
    36	flock 9
    37	
    38	printf '📦 Starting NixOS update...\n'
    39	cd "$flake_dir"
    40	
    41	backup_dir=$(mktemp -d)
    42	if [[ -f flake.lock ]]; then
    43	  cp -p flake.lock "$backup_dir/flake.lock"
    44	  had_lockfile=true
    45	fi
    46	rollback_pending=true
    47	
    48	if ! nix flake update; then
    49	  restore_lockfile
    50	  rollback_pending=false
    51	  flock -u 9
    52	  printf '\n❌ Lockfile update failed. The previous lockfile was restored.\n'
    53	  wait_before_close
    54	  exit 1
    55	fi
    56	
    57	if ! nh os switch; then
    58	  restore_lockfile
    59	  rollback_pending=false
    60	  flock -u 9
    61	  printf '\n❌ System rebuild failed. The previous lockfile was restored.\n'
    62	  wait_before_close
    63	  exit 1
    64	fi
    65	
    66	rollback_pending=false
    67	temporary=$(mktemp "$cache_dir/updates.XXXXXX")
    68	jq -cn '{state: "ok", hasUpdates: false, message: "Just updated",
    69	  updates: [], checkedAt: (now | floor)}' >"$temporary"
    70	mv "$temporary" "$cache_file"
    71	flock -u 9
    72	
    73	qs --config top-bar ipc call topbar refreshNix || true
    74	
    75	printf '\n✅ Update complete. Quickshell status refreshed.\n'
    76	wait_before_close
